title: Opti
description: A modpack that optimizes Minecraft but also makes it better.
body:
**Opti** is a modpack made for optimiaztion, and better gameplay.  

Combining mods that optimize Minecraft, like **_ImmediatelyFast_**, but then has expirience mods like _**Chat Heads**_ to make Minecraft more enjoyable. This way you get less lag but still enjoyable.


<details>
<summary>Included Mods</summary>
  
 Optimization:  
 
  -Dynamic FPS  
  -Entity Culling  
  -FastChest  
  -FerriteCore  
  -ImmediatelyFast  
  -Lithium  
  -No Waypoints/Locator Bar  
  -Remove Reloading Screen  
  -Server Pinger Fixer  
  -Sodium  
  -Sodium Extras  
  -Stfu  
  -Bobby Mod  
  -Bad Optimizations  
  -More Culling
  
 Enjoyment:  
  -Capes  
  -Chat Heads  
  -Connected Paths  
  -Dynamic Crosshair  
  -LambDynamicLights  
  -M.R.U.  
  -MinecraftCapes  
  -Mod Menu  
  -Shulker Box Tooltip  
  -Skin Shuffle  
  -Sounds  
  -Zoomify  
  -Cherished Worlds  
  -Stendhal  
  -Dynamic Crosshair  
  -Paper Doll  
  -Freelook  
  -Scoreboard Overhaul  

 Other:  
  -AppleSkin  
  -Iris Shaders  
  -Crash Assistant  

 Resource Packs & Shaders:  
  -Borderless Glass  
  -Complementary Shaders  
  -Fast Better Grass  
  -Low Fire  
  -Mellow  
  -qrrafty's Capitalized Font  
  -Renderpearl  
  -Unique Dark  
  -Visual: Armor Trims  
  -(Bee's) Fancy Crops
</details>
  

This is the modpack I personally use, so I hope it works out well for you too.  
-mintchocchip100
